# freitagskind apps

> Independent mobile app studio building thoughtful tools for everyday life. Current focus: Pendula, a countdown widget for important moments. Primary audience: people who want calmer, utility-first apps. Contact: freitagskindapps@gmail.com.

This file follows the community `/llms.txt` proposal (Markdown at site root, curated links for LLM context). It complements `/robots.txt` and `/sitemap.xml`; it does not replace semantic HTML or JSON-LD on the live pages.

## Site

- [Marketing home](https://freitagskindapps.github.io/): Positioning, Pendula overview, studio story, and contact.

## Apps

- [Pendula (featured app on home)](https://freitagskindapps.github.io/#apps): Countdown widget for birthdays, trips, goals, and milestones (Android; formerly Daymark).

## Contact

- [Email](mailto:freitagskindapps@gmail.com): General inquiries for freitagskind apps.

## Optional

- [GitHub organization](https://github.com/freitagskindapps): Source and open-source presence when relevant to developers.
